\tzpentry{ID3290}{Helmholtz Boundary Pressure Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3290 introduces Helmholtz Boundary Pressure Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \nabla^2 p + k^2 p = 0, \quad p|_{ \partial V} = f( \theta, \phi, t) \end{equation}
